title: Ultra Photorealistic Vertical Instagram Story Style 3x2
sourceTitle: Ultra Photorealistic Vertical Instagram Story Style 3x2
prompt:
Ultra-photorealistic vertical Instagram Story style 3x2 selfie collage, six candid frames of the same beautiful young woman, consistent face and identity across every panel. Soft Mediterranean beauty, warm glowing skin, real pore texture, natural asymmetry, fluffy dark brows, almond eyes, plump glossy pink lips with wet high-shine gloss, soft nude-pink makeup, dewy cheeks, subtle bronzer.

She wears a pale butter-yellow halter-neck dress with a deep elegant neckline, soft draped fabric, feminine summer look. Hair is dark brown, messy chic low bun with loose face-framing strands, effortless and slightly undone. Small gold hoop earrings, delicate rings, glossy pale-pink manicured nails.

Create a playful Instagram Story selfie grid: top row two close selfies with soft pout, middle row one wink selfie and one side-angle kissy pose, bottom row one extreme lip-gloss close-up and one blowing-a-kiss pose with hand near lips. Same indoor apartment background in every frame, soft daylight, white walls, doorway, black hanging lamp, natural home atmosphere. Add subtle Instagram story UI at the top: profile circle, username “ozgedoner”, time “2s”, progress bar, three dots and close icon, clean and realistic.

Camera style: iPhone front-camera realism, slightly candid, sharp but natural, no studio look. Warm daylight, soft shadows, realistic skin, glossy lip reflections, fabric texture, natural hand anatomy. Pinterest-core it-girl selfie aesthetic, playful, pretty, confident, effortless.

Negative prompt: low quality, blurry face, pixelated, cartoon, illustration, 3D render, plastic skin, AI doll face, inconsistent face, different woman in each panel, distorted lips, overfilled lips, bad hands, extra fingers, fused fingers, broken nails, distorted sunglasses, messy text, wrong username, watermark, harsh studio lighting, overexposed skin, fake fabric, unnatural pose.
